name: Donkey of the King’s Entry
oracleText:
When Donkey of the King's Entry enters the battlefield, target creature you control gains trample and vigilance until end of turn.
{2}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target legendary creature you control.
flavorText: "Behold, thy King cometh unto thee, meek, and sitting upon an ass." — Matthew 21:5
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Jerusalem Jerusalem" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: This Jerusalem-facing Tissot scene supports the kingly-entry card with the right holy-city atmosphere.
